Domestic Box Office $53,695,808Details

Total $31,879,737

Opening Weekend:$6,481,221 (12.1% of total gross)
Legs:5.78 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.2 times production budget)

Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $91,469,757

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 21st, 2007 (Wide) by Warner Bros., released as P.S., I Love You
Video Release: May 6th, 2008 by Warner Home Video, released as P.S., I Love You
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual references and brief nudity
Running Time: 126 minutes
Geographical setting: Ireland, Manhattan
Plot point: Cancer, Romance, Terminal Illness, Widow/Widower
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Alcon Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
